item.title: Prospector Popcorn, LLC: Prospector Popcorn brand Belgian Chocolate Toffee flavored popcorn; Recall
item.product: Prospector Popcorn brand Belgian Chocolate Toffee flavored popcorn;
item.summary: Products contain undeclared soy, specifically soy lecithin. Product details: Prospector Popcorn brand Belgian Chocolate Toffee flavored popcorn; Ingredients: Non-GMO popcorn, brown sugar, corn syrup, butter, vanilla, baking soda, sea salt, white chocolate (sugar, palm kernel fat, skimmed milk powder [12%], emulsifier [lecithins], natur...
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
